hints: Complemento: antes de que llegara el médico

spanishSentence: Los pacientes habían estado descansando durante tres horas antes de que llegara el médico.
correctSentence: The patients had been resting for three hours before the doctor arrived.

hints: Tiempo: durante tres horas antes de que llegara el doctor

correctSentence: The nurse had been assisting the patient for three hours before the doctor arrived.

hints: Verbo: Estar (aspecto progresivo en pasado perfecto)

correctSentence: The doctor had not been prescribing antibiotics for that long before the patient's condition improved.

correctSentence: The dentist had not been examining the patient's teeth for more than five minutes when he found the cavity.

correctSentence: We had not been exercising regularly before we were admitted to the hospital.

correctSentence: The therapist had been giving massages to patients for over ten years before she opened her own wellness clinic.

correctSentence: The patient had been recovering from the surgery for three months before he was finally discharged from the hospital.
